global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with promotional elements for a food service.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 late-night deal with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Two glasses
elements.description: Two stylized glasses are depicted in a minimalistic design, positioned centrally with a light pink hue.

elements.label: Three dots
elements.description: Three small, evenly spaced dots below the glasses, rendered in a soft pink color.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting text.

elements.label: Late-night deals text
elements.description: Text in white font below the glasses, stating '2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available' in a friendly, inviting style.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small white text displaying '30%' at the bottom left, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Start now' in bold white font against a solid color background.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' is displayed at the top center in a bold, modern font, colored white.

elements.label: Start now text
elements.description: Text in white font on the call to action button, inviting users to engage.

elements.label: Discount percentage badge
elements.description: A small white text displaying '30%' at the bottom left, indicating a discount.

elements.label: Sale headline
elements.description: A bold text at the top left corner stating 'SALE' in a bright yellow color.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, 2-for-1 deal, QuickFork logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top center, the headline is in the top left, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: QuickFork, 2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available, Start now, 30%, SALE
